x-enumeration-literals.name: Applicant
x-enumeration-literals.description: The party that requests a bank guarantee from the bank and borrows from a creditor

x-enumeration-literals.name: Beneficiary
x-enumeration-literals.description: The party that receives a partial guarantee

x-enumeration-literals.name: Bank
x-enumeration-literals.description: The party that agrees to sign and assures payment in case the applicant fails to repay the loan

x-enumeration-literals.name: Guarantor
x-enumeration-literals.description: Legal entity, other than the issuer, who gives a guarantee. The guarantor becomes liable in case of default.(ISO20022)
